rationale: r0c0 is 0.10 below threshold with urgent need; r2c2 has recovered capacity to support at balanced sharing rate without compromising grid stability.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.65, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood in collective crisis; r2c2 has recovered to safe SoC and can now support critical peers at balanced rate while maintaining islanded stability..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
